args: PLUGIN_HOME="$HOME/plugins/blender"; if [ -x "$PLUGIN_HOME/.venv/bin/python" ] && [ -f "$PLUGIN_HOME/scripts/blender_mcp_bridge.py" ]; then exec "$PLUGIN_HOME/.venv/bin/python" "$PLUGIN_HOME/scripts/blender_mcp_bridge.py"; fi; REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; REPO_PLUGIN="$REPO_ROOT/plugins/blender"; if [ -x "$REPO_PLUGIN/.venv/bin/python" ] && [ -f "$REPO_PLUGIN/scripts/blender_mcp_bridge.py" ]; then exec "$REPO_PLUGIN/.venv/bin/python" "$REPO_PLUGIN/scripts/blender_mcp_bridge.py"; fi; if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -c 'from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP' >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec python3 "$REPO_PLUGIN/scripts/blender_mcp_bridge.py"; fi; echo 'Blender MCP runtime is not installed. Run python3 plugins/blender/scripts/install_global_blender_plugin.py first.' >&2; exit 1
